# Mariden Resort and Homestay Siargao

> Quiet family-run pool resort in Del Carmen, Siargao, Philippines — 5 minutes from the airport. Affordable, family-friendly accommodations with free Starlink WiFi.

**For complete information, see [llms-full.txt](https://www.maridenresort.com/llms-full.txt)**

## Rooms

- [Cozy Double Room](https://www.maridenresort.com/rooms#double-room): ₱1,500/night, sleeps 2-3 guests, AC, hot shower, private bathroom
- [Twin A-Frame Room](https://www.maridenresort.com/rooms#a-frame-room): ₱2,500/night, sleeps 2-4 guests, porch, AC, hot shower
- [Snug Family Room](https://www.maridenresort.com/rooms#family-cottage): ₱4,000/night, sleeps 6-8 guests, private cottage with living area

## Amenities

- [Swimming Pool](https://www.maridenresort.com/amenities): Open daily 8AM-8PM
- [Event Cottages](https://www.maridenresort.com/amenities): ₱500-₱1,500, seats 10-60 guests
- [Full Amenities List](https://www.maridenresort.com/amenities): Free Starlink WiFi, laundry service, airport transfers, motorbike rentals, catering services

## Booking

- [Book Direct (Best Rates)](https://book.maridenresort.com/booking/result?code=019d8aea-246b-78ee-8502-31f2f1f946fe): Our direct booking engine
- Also available on: Booking.com, Airbnb, Agoda, Expedia, Traveloka

## Contact

- Phone/WhatsApp: +63 920 725 4405
- Email: info@maridenresort.com
- [Contact Page](https://www.maridenresort.com/contact)
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/MaridenResort)
- [Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/YqtvhJ5DspCZxY2Z6)

## Location

- Address: Brgy. Lobogon, Del Carmen, Surigao del Norte 8418, Philippines
- 5 minutes from Siargao Airport (IAO)
- 20-25 minutes from General Luna / Cloud 9

## Travel Guides (14 Total)

**Del Carmen Area (8 guides):**
- [Sugba Lagoon](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/sugba-lagoon): Del Carmen's most famous attraction - hidden lagoon boat tour (5-10 min)
- [Mangrove Boardwalk](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/mangrove-boardwalk): Philippines' largest contiguous mangrove forest (5-10 min)
- [Maasin River & Coconut Road](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/maasin-coconut-plantation-and-river): Famous palm tree road and river kayaking (15 min)
- [Sohoton Cove](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/sohoton-cove): Enchanted lagoon, caves, and jellyfish sanctuary (boat tour from Del Carmen)
- [Tri-Island Tour](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/tri-island-tour): Guyam, Daku, and Naked Island hopping tour (boat tour)
- [Alegria Beach](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/alegria-beach): Santa Monica's white sand beach with calm waters (43-47 min)
- [Taktak Falls](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/taktak-falls): 15-meter jungle waterfall in Santa Monica (40-60 min)
- [Secret Beach (Malinao)](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/secret-beach-malinao): Hidden beach in Malinao

**North Siargao (2 guides):**
- [Magpupungko Rock Pools](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/magpupungko-rock-pools): Tidal rock pools on east coast (30 min)
- [Pacifico Beach](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/pacifico-beach): Premier surf beach with Big Wish break (45-60 min)

**Travel Planning (4 guides):**
- [Siargao Airport Guide](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/airport-guide): Terminal info, transfers, and arrival tips
- [Transportation Guide](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/transportation-guide): Getting around the island
- [Best Time to Visit](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/best-time-to-visit): Weather and seasonal planning
- [Del Carmen vs. General Luna](https://www.maridenresort.com/guides/del-carmen-vs-gl): Choosing where to stay in Siargao

## About

- [Our Story](https://www.maridenresort.com/about): Family-run since 2022
- [Gallery](https://www.maridenresort.com/gallery): Photos of the resort
- [FAQ](https://www.maridenresort.com/faq): Answers to common questions

## Policies

- Check-in: 2:00 PM (free early check-in when available)
- Check-out: 12:00 PM (noon)
- Pets: Not allowed inside rooms or indoor areas. Service animals permitted with prior notice.
- Children under 5: Stay free
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.maridenresort.com/terms-conditions)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.maridenresort.com/privacy-policy)
